testcase.name: dev-utils > Base64 > encodes
dev-utils > Base64 > decodes
dev-utils > Base64 > round-trips
dev-utils > URL encode/decode > encodes
dev-utils > URL encode/decode > decodes
dev-utils > generateUuid > generates a string
dev-utils > generateUuid > generates unique
Error System > creates ValidationError
Error System > creates ProcessingError
Error System > creates PlatformError
Error System > serializes error
Error System > returns friendly message
image-utils > getExtensionFromMime
image-utils > formatFileSize
image-utils > compressionRatio
image-utils > validateImageFile accepts valid type
image-utils > validateImageFile rejects invalid type
image-utils > ACCEPTED_IMAGE_TYPES contains expected types
Manifest Validation > validates tool category
Manifest Validation > validates lifecycle
Manifest Validation > validates limits
Manifest Validation > rejects negative limits
pdf-utils > parsePageRange single
pdf-utils > parsePageRange range
pdf-utils > parsePageRange throws for invalid
Tool Registry > contains tools
Tool Registry > finds tool by slug
Tool Registry > returns undefined for unknown slug
Tool Registry > filters by category
Tool Registry > finds related tools
text-utils > convertCase
text-utils > removeDuplicateLines
text-utils > sortLines
text-utils > countText
text-utils > diffText
EventBus > subscribes and receives events with full BaseEvent shape
EventBus > supports multiple subscribers
EventBus > unsubscribe function returned by on() works
EventBus > listeners that throw do not break the bus
EventBus > clear() removes all subscribers
EventBus > wildcard listener receives all events
FeatureFlagService > isEnabled returns the configured value
FeatureFlagService > isEnabled returns false for unknown keys
FeatureFlagService > register() adds a new flag and notifies subscribers
FeatureFlagService > setEnabled() updates an existing flag
FeatureFlagService > setEnabled() on unknown flag is a no-op
FeatureFlagService > all() returns every registered flag
FeatureFlagService > evaluate() respects 100% rollout
FeatureFlagService > evaluate() respects 0% rollout
FeatureFlagService > evaluate() returns false when flag is disabled
FeatureFlagService > subscribe() returns an unsubscribe function
SEO metadata generation > every tool has an SeoMetaEntry
SEO metadata generation > every canonical URL is absolute
SEO metadata generation > openGraph has required fields
SEO metadata generation > twitterCard has required fields
StorageService with MemoryStorageAdapter > put + get round-trips a string
StorageService with MemoryStorageAdapter > returns null for missing keys
StorageService with MemoryStorageAdapter > deletes a value
StorageService with MemoryStorageAdapter > clears all values
StorageService with MemoryStorageAdapter > can swap adapters via setAdapter
MemoryStorageAdapter > isolates data per instance
base64-encoder — integration > manifest is well-formed
base64-encoder — integration > stages are wired in manifest
base64-encoder — integration > inputSchema is callable
base64-encoder — integration > validation stage returns structured result
base64-encoder — integration > processing stage is async
base64-encoder — integration > download stage is callable
base64-encoder — integration > seo has required fields
base64-encoder — integration > structured data is SoftwareApplication
base64-encoder — integration > related tools is array
base64-encoder — integration > analytics has funnel steps
base64-encoder — integration > does not require auth (LOCK-07: guest-first)
